glosses.ja: 押し込む; 詰め込む

sentences.target: Je fourre ça dans mon sac.

translations.fr: Je fourre ça dans mon sac.
translations.en: I’m stuffing this into my bag.
translations.es: Estoy metiendo esto en mi mochila.
translations.de: Ich stopfe das in meinen Rucksack.
translations.ru: Я запихиваю это в свой рюкзак.
translations.pt: Estou enfiando isso na minha mochila.
translations.he: אני דוחף את זה לתיק שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang nhét cái này vào ba lô.
translations.nl: Ik stop dit in mijn rugzak.
translations.uk: Я запихаю це в свій рюкзак.
translations.hi: मैं इसे अपने बैग में ठूँस रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg stapper dette ned i sekken min.
translations.id: Aku menjejalkan ini ke dalam tas saya.
translations.sv: Jag trycker ner det här i ryggsäcken.
translations.da: Jeg stopper det ned i rygsækken.
translations.ja: 今これをバッグに突っ込んでる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; refers to the speaker.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of stuffing/putting.
Demonstrative pronoun functioning as a direct object.
Preposition introducing a locative/directional prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies the noun 'sac'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans' (head of the prepositional complement).

sentences.target: Tu peux fourrer les clés dans ta poche.
sentences.reading: /ty pø fuʁe le kle dɑ̃ ta pɔʃ/

translations.fr: Tu peux fourrer les clés dans ta poche.
translations.ipa: /ty pø fuʁe le kle dɑ̃ ta pɔʃ/
translations.en: Can you stuff the keys in your pocket?
translations.es: ¿Puedes meter las llaves en tu bolsillo?
translations.de: Kannst du die Schlüssel in deine Hosentasche stecken?
translations.it: Puoi infilare le chiavi in tasca?
translations.zh-Hans: 你能把钥匙塞进口袋里吗？
translations.yue: 你可唔可以將啲鎖匙塞入你個袋度？
translations.pt: Você pode enfiar as chaves no bolso?
translations.he: אתה יכול לדחוף את המפתחות לכיס שלך?
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nhét chìa khóa vào túi của mình không?
translations.ar: هل يمكنك أن تحشر المفاتيح في جيبك؟
translations.nl: Kun je de sleutels in je broekzak stoppen?
translations.hu: Be tudnád gyömöszölni a kulcsokat a zsebedbe?
translations.hi: क्या तुम चाबियाँ अपनी जेब में ठूँस सकते हो?
translations.el: Μπορείς να χώσεις τα κλειδιά στην τσέπη σου?
translations.nb: Kan du stappe nøklene i lomma di?
translations.id: Bisakah kamu menyelipkan kunci ke saku kamu?
translations.sv: Kan du trycka ner nycklarna i fickan?
translations.ro: Poți să îndeși cheile în buzunar?
translations.da: Kan du stoppe nøglerne ned i lommen?
translations.ja: 鍵をポケットに突っ込んでくれる？

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Finite verb (modal), present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses ability/permission.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'peux'.
Definite article, plural; determiner for 'clés'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'fourrer'.
Preposition introducing a locative/directional complement.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, feminine singular; modifies 'poche'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Il fourre le reçu dans son portefeuille.
sentences.reading: /il fuʁ lə ʁəsy dɑ̃ sɔ̃ pɔʁtəfœj/

translations.fr: Il fourre le reçu dans son portefeuille.
translations.ipa: /il fuʁ lə ʁəsy dɑ̃ sɔ̃ pɔʁtəfœj/
translations.en: He’s stuffing the receipt into his wallet.
translations.es: Está metiendo el recibo en su billetera.
translations.de: Er stopft den Kassenbon in sein Portemonnaie.
translations.it: Sta infilando lo scontrino nel portafoglio.
translations.ko: 그는 영수증을 지갑에 쑤셔 넣고 있어.
translations.ru: Он запихивает чек в свой кошелек.
translations.pt: Ele está enfiando o recibo na carteira.
translations.he: הוא דוחף את הקבלה לארנק שלו.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang nhét hóa đơn vào ví của mình.
translations.nl: Hij stopt de bon in zijn portemonnee.
translations.uk: Він запихає чек у свій гаманець.
translations.hi: वह रसीद को अपने बटुए में ठूँस रहा है.
translations.el: Χώνει την απόδειξη στο πορτοφόλι του.
translations.nb: Han stapper kvitteringen ned i lommeboka.
translations.sv: Han trycker ner kvittot i plånboken.
translations.da: Han stopper kvitteringen ned i pungen.
translations.ja: 彼はレシートを財布に突っ込んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'reçu'.
Common noun (nominalized past participle); direct object of 'fourre'.
Preposition introducing a locative/directional complement.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'portefeuille'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Arrête de fourrer ton nez partout.

translations.fr: Arrête de fourrer ton nez partout.
translations.es: Deja de meter la nariz en todas partes.
translations.de: Hör auf, überall deine Nase hineinzustecken.
translations.it: Smettila di ficcare il naso dappertutto.
translations.pt: Para de enfiar o nariz em todo lugar.
translations.he: תפסיק לדחוף את האף שלך לכל מקום.
translations.vi: Đừng chõ mũi vào mọi chuyện.
translations.ar: توقف عن إدخال أنفك في كل شيء.
translations.nl: Hou op met overal je neus in te steken.
translations.hu: Ne dugd bele az orrod mindenbe.
translations.hi: हर जगह अपनी नाक मत घुसाओ.
translations.el: Σταμάτα να χώνεις τη μύτη σου παντού.
translations.nb: Slutt å stikke nesa di i alt mulig.
translations.sv: Sluta lägga näsan i blöt överallt.
translations.ro: Nu mai băga nasul peste tot.
translations.da: Hold op med at stikke næsen i alt.
translations.ja: あちこちに首を突っ込むのはやめて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative form, 2nd person singular; main predicate commanding cessation.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement after 'arrête'.
Infinitive verb; complement of 'de' (linked to 'Arrête').
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'nez'.
Common noun; direct object of the infinitive 'fourrer'.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase; indicates wide/general location.
